fields.name: flight_number
fields.doc: Denormalised flight number for fast lookup (VARCHAR 10)

fields.name: case_status
fields.doc: Case lifecycle status: Open | Under Review | Resolved | Closed | Escalated (VARCHAR 20)

fields.name: opened_at
fields.doc: Case open timestamp as ISO-8601 UTC string (TIMESTAMPTZ)

fields.name: last_updated_at
fields.doc: Last modification timestamp as ISO-8601 UTC string (TIMESTAMPTZ)

fields.name: closed_at
fields.doc: Case close timestamp as ISO-8601 UTC string (TIMESTAMPTZ, null while open)
